findings.title: Allocation-heavy loop
findings.message: string "out" accumulates fmt.Sprintf output inside a loop; use strings.Builder or fmt.Fprintf on a builder
findings.why: string "out" accumulates fmt.Sprintf output inside a loop; use strings.Builder or fmt.Fprintf on a builder
findings.how_to_fix: Use strings.Builder for string accumulation and preallocate slice capacity with make(len 0, cap n) before the loop.

findings.title: Allocation-heavy loop
findings.message: append to slice "values" inside a loop with a knowable bound; preallocate capacity with make before the loop
findings.why: append to slice "values" inside a loop with a knowable bound; preallocate capacity with make before the loop
findings.how_to_fix: Use strings.Builder for string accumulation and preallocate slice capacity with make(len 0, cap n) before the loop.

findings.title: N+1 query in loop
findings.message: query call Exec inside a loop suggests an N+1 query pattern; batch the query or hoist it out of the loop
findings.why: query call Exec inside a loop suggests an N+1 query pattern; batch the query or hoist it out of the loop
findings.how_to_fix: Batch the lookups into one query, prefetch the data before the loop, or use a bulk API.

findings.title: Python blocking call in async function
findings.message: blocking call inside an async function stalls the event loop; use an async client or asyncio.sleep
findings.why: blocking call inside an async function stalls the event loop; use an async client or asyncio.sleep
findings.how_to_fix: Use an async HTTP client (httpx.AsyncClient, aiohttp) and asyncio.sleep inside async functions.

findings.title: N+1 query in loop
findings.message: query or request call inside a loop suggests an N+1 pattern; batch the work or hoist the call out of the loop
findings.why: query or request call inside a loop suggests an N+1 pattern; batch the work or hoist the call out of the loop
findings.how_to_fix: Batch the lookups into one query, prefetch the data before the loop, or use a bulk API.
